description: A square designed graphic from the DHS 'Know2Protect' 'Top 10 Tips2Protect' online-child-safety series. Blue gradient background (light blue top, navy below) with cut-paper summer clip-art across the top: clouds, butterflies, a camera, a red-and-white life ring, a green popsicle, blue sunglasses, a watermelon slice, and a sun. A yellow rounded banner with black bold text reads 'TOP 10 TIPS2PROTECT.' Large white bold text at left reads 'TIP 2.' Center features a magenta/pink padlock icon above an orange-outlined password entry field showing four blue asterisks (****). Large white centered bold text reads: 'Password-protect or control access to your child's app store and gaming downloads.' At bottom are the white DHS seal and the 'know2protect' speech-bubble logo with tagline 'Together We Can Stop Online Child Exploitation.'
notable_text: TOP 10 TIPS2PROTECT; TIP 2; Password-protect or control access to your child's app store and gaming downloads.; know2protect - Together We Can Stop Online Child Exploitation
